title: Net Burn vs Gross Burn — Trend Analysis
notes: Per slide 2 deck note: 'Gross Burn takes into account all expenses as they are written on the IS MTD'. Both lines plotted negative (outflow). Gross Burn (dark teal) = -(Cost of Sales + Production + R&D + S&M + G&A + Finance costs). Net Burn (orange) = Sales - opex_sum (negative when burning). Excludes Depreciation and Income tax (non-cash / below-the-line).
